task_description: Phase 10: Replace ALL stubs with real SDK integrations - Stripe, FFmpeg, FCM, Prisma+Redis social graph, MeiliSearch, SMTP, Redis auction, pgvector matching, CloudFront CDN

Pre-existing failures in @quant/auth (TS6305), quantmail/quantedits/quantneon/quantube (PostCSS/vitest config) are unrelated.
